content: img src '  alt 'A motorboat cruises off the coast of the United Arab Emirates, on the Strait of Hormuz, with a tanker seen in the background, on February 25, 2026. Tanker traffic through the strait has come essentially to a stop after Iran declared the strait closed following attacks on Iran by the U.S. and Israel.'   p Global oil prices are in the high  70s as traffic through Strait of Hormuz comes to a halt. Some analysts have warned they could top  100 a barrel if the stoppage is prolonged.  p  p  Image credit  Fadel Senna   p  img src '

metadata.author: Camila Domonoske
